title: Gan Fall and Chopper Struggle
description: The battles across Upper Yard widen as the Shandia, priests, and Straw Hats all collide in the forest.
scene: Across pages 11, 12, 13, 14, this scene centers on Chopper, Gedatsu, Gan Fall, Nami, Zoro. The battles across Upper Yard widen as the Shandia, priests, and Straw Hats all collide in the forest.

dialogue.speaker: Gan Fall
dialogue.text: Yehahahaha, I was bored! Come. Sit!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: How do they know about the gold....!?

dialogue.speaker: Shandia warrior
dialogue.text: They will undoubtedly start taking action tomorrow...

dialogue.speaker: Wyper
dialogue.text: That is because it's almost completed

dialogue.speaker: Gan Fall
dialogue.text: It wasn't a dream after all!!

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Yup... even the broken mast was re-attached.

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: ...I thought it was some kinda ghost....

summary: The battles across Upper Yard widen as the Shandia, priests, and Straw Hats all collide in the forest.
